overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian urban environment with industrial architecture, passing vehicles and pedestrians on a sunny day. The clip follows the character from a street with elevated pipelines to a commercial area featuring a distinctive teal art deco building.

events.description: brown pickup truck passes from left to right in front of the camera
camera moves past the truck and continues forward along the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past a parked truck, moving toward an intersection with industrial structures ahead

notable_agents.action: brown armored pickup truck driving past the camera from left to right

entered.detail: armored brown pickup truck with covered bed and industrial styling
red neon sign reading FOODSCAPE mounted on building facade
large industrial pipeline structure running overhead with support beams
multi-story industrial buildings with weathered facades and metal structures

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a brown armored pickup truck passing by on an industrial city street. The camera follows a character walking forward beneath an elevated pipeline structure, with the red FOODSCAPE sign and industrial buildings visible in the background.

events.description: moving from narrow sidewalk into wide open intersection area
pedestrians crossing the street ahead at the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the intersection toward a large electricity pylon, navigating around pedestrians crossing the street

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red pants walking across the crosswalk ahead of the camera

entered.detail: tall black metal lattice electricity pylon with 06 marking and multiple cables
large metallic spherical industrial tanks with weathered surfaces
building with black and white checkered pattern and 52 COMBAT CAR signage
large digital screen displaying animated advertisements on building facade

segments.scene_description: The character moves into a wide industrial intersection dominated by a massive electricity pylon marked 06. Large spherical tanks and elevated pipelines frame the background while the character crosses toward a building with prominent 52 Combat Car signage and digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with mixed industrial and retail buildings

events.description: passing the combat car building and continuing down the commercial street
slight turn to the left to approach the teal building

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk following other pedestrians, passing parked vehicles and approaching a distinctive teal building

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt and dark pants walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: teal-colored art deco style building with geometric patterns and weathered facade
vertical purple neon sign reading BEEP with decorative elements
dark sedan parked along the curb with chrome details

segments.scene_description: The character continues down the commercial street, passing the Combat Car building and approaching a distinctive teal art deco building with a purple neon BEEP sign. Other pedestrians walk ahead on the sidewalk while cars are parked along the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial building entrance with covered awning

events.description: walking under the yellow illuminated awning of the BEEP building
slowing down and looking up at the building facade and awning details

agents.ego_description: approaching the entrance of the teal building and walking under the covered awning, examining the art deco architectural details

entered.detail: yellow illuminated art deco awning over the building entrance with geometric patterns
covered entrance area with teal support columns and recessed lighting

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the teal BEEP building, walking under its yellow illuminated art deco awning. The camera looks up at the architectural details, neon signage, and covered entrance area as the character moves into the sheltered space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gritty industrial district that gradually transitions into a vibrant commercial street. It begins on a city road as a brown armored pickup truck passes by, following a character walking beneath an elevated pipeline structure and a red FOODSCAPE sign. As the character moves forward, the scene opens into a wide intersection dominated by a massive electricity pylon and spherical tanks before shifting toward a building featuring digital billboards and 52 Combat Car signage. The camera then continues down the street, passing parked cars and pedestrians as the industrial gray tones give way to the striking teal facade of an art deco building with a purple neon BEEP sign. Finally, the movement leads the character under a yellow illuminated awning, tilting upward to capture the intricate architectural details and neon lights of the sheltered entrance.
